mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, nickname, status, last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, last_login_ip AS lastLoginIp, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM admin_user WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nickname}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY id DESC
